stage_01.reasoning: Both failures are expected consequences of later stages: stage_08/stage_09 explicitly upgrade the image to v23.2.7 then v24.1.1 (matching the oracle's observed v24.1.1), and stage_03 explicitly enables TLS, ending insecure mode. The stale stage_01 oracle just re-checks the original deploy-time state.

stage_08.reasoning: The oracle re-check expects v23.2.7, but the observed state (v24.1.1, SQL version mismatch) exactly matches stage_09's task of upgrading the cluster to v24.1.1 and finalizing the major upgrade — a later stage legitimately superseded stage_08's state.
